title: Дебіторська заборгованість в системі бухгалтерського обліку: класифікація, оцінка, порядок визнання
author: Степаненко, О.І.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The implementation of management functions regarding receivables necessitates the solution of such tasks as the study of its economic essence, the accuracy of classification and stages of occurrence in modern business conditions. The study of the receivables management system as an important factor in increasing the efficiency of the formation and use of working capital of enterprises is becoming particularly relevant. Receivables are not only an indicator that determines the level of debt, but also an economic phenomenon that affects the activities of the business entity as a whole.
